If you really want to improve your English, try to subscribe some English content YouTube channel and turn on the caption while you are watching them, so that you are able to know the Chinese meaning of words they said in English. Always remember that English is a language, language is used for communication, the most effective way to learn English is to interact with someone in English.
I don't know whether you are "fake plastic" or not, and I am not sure whether you know what 7 I said.
Good luck and hope you enjoy learning English
